ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DEFENDANT IRVING PARKER JR. IS GRANTED IN PART. HALF OF THE MONEY ($397.21) HELD BY THE SHERIFF WILL BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR AND THE REMAINDER ($397.22) WILL BE RELEASED TO MR. PARKER. GOING FORWARD, $60 WILL BE WITHHELD FROM EACH PAYCHECK AND PAID TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER : MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 =302/HK

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Dec-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DEFENDANT IRVING PARKER JR. is granted in part. Half of the money ($397.21) held by the Sheriff will be released to the judgment creditor and the remainder ($397.22) will be released to Mr. Parker. Going forward, $60 will be withheld from each paycheck and paid to them judgment creditor. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert;
Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/hk

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-10-1998 Sweep; Adjudicated

STATUS CONFERENCE
